title: The Relationships Overlay
description: What happens when two blueprints meet. Electromagnetic channels, companionship, and the gift of difference.
topic: Composite Relationships and the Overlay View
learningGoal: User can interpret a composite chart, distinguish electromagnetic from companionship channels, and understand the dynamics of defined-meets-undefined.
keyPoints: Electromagnetic channels appear when each person carries one half of a channel — magnetic and complementary
Companionship channels appear when both people carry the same complete channel — shared and familiar
Defined-undefined dynamics show where one person consistently amplifies an open center in the other
Difference is not friction; it is the structural source of attraction and complementarity
forbiddenClaims: this person is right for you
this person is wrong for you
toneNotes: Warm but precise. Avoid romantic mysticism. Treat relationships as the meeting of two distinct architectures.
narration_script:
When two blueprints meet, a third structure appears.

The composite chart shows you both people overlaid on the same body graph. Each person's defined centers and channels are visible. Where they connect, you can read the dynamics of the relationship itself.

Electromagnetic channels are where one person carries one half of a channel and the other person carries the other half. Apart, neither of you has the channel. Together, the channel completes. This is magnetic. It is the structural source of attraction. You feel pulled because something genuinely completes between you.

Companionship channels are where both of you already carry the full channel on your own. When you are together, that shared trait is reinforced. There is familiarity. There is recognition. There is the quiet pleasure of being seen by someone who already knows the terrain.

Defined-undefined dynamics show where one person consistently amplifies an open center in the other. The defined partner broadcasts that energy. The undefined partner feels it constantly. Over time, this is where conditioning happens. It is also where wisdom accumulates.

Difference is not a problem to solve. It is the architecture of relationship.

When you understand what is electromagnetic, what is companionship, and what is amplification, you stop arguing about the wrong things. You can see the structure underneath the story.

You meet each other where you actually are.

scene_directives.text: When two blueprints meet, a third structure appears.
Electromagnetic channels: one half each. Apart, incomplete. Together, the channel closes. This is the magnetic source of attraction.
Companionship channels are shared. Amplification happens where one of you is defined and the other is open. Difference is the architecture.
Read the structure underneath the story. Meet each other where you actually are.

output_metadata.title: Reading the Relationships Overlay: Two Blueprints Meeting
output_metadata.description: Electromagnetic, companionship, and amplification — the three dynamics that emerge when blueprints overlay.
